name: Cloak of Cubic Enigma
description: Notes An offensive cloak designed to wreak as much havoc as possible while staying mobile, leaving behind explosions as you travel to deal high AoE damage. It also provides a good DEF boost.
effects: Shadow Burst: Leaves bursts of damage in your wake while Invisible. Duration: 4.8 seconds Damage: 600 (Total: 7200) Range: 4.5 tiles Burst Cooldown: 0.4 seconds Ignores defense of target After exiting sneak: Fire 2 additional projectiles dealing damage equal to your Lethal Strike damage for 2.4 seconds. Sneak: Invisible for 5 seconds. After 1 second can be canceled by shooting. On Invisible end: Lose the effects of Shadow Burst Lethal Strike: Your weapon deals 65 (+3 per DEF > 25) and 45% (+0.5% per DEF > 25) of target’s defense as additional damage for 2.4 seconds MP Cost: 2 MP/proj Cooldown: 0.1 sec
